prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2023年理科最低位次约12639→13491→13725，呈逐年后移趋势；2024年甘肃省实施新高考（3+1+2模式），本科一批与本科二批合并为本科批，位次体系重构 ，物理类最低位次骤升至22229名；2025年进一步后移至36344名。近两年位次大幅后移主要受批次合并影响，不代表学校热度下降；该校在甘肃理科/物理类招 生计划2021–2023年均为34人，2024–2025年增至38人；2026年计划仍为38人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学 排名从2021年第135名持续上升至2026年第85名，近年排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力增强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告条件设置不 当引发舆情，学校已终止招聘并致歉；抖音热度排名第76（一般），综合热度34万，无明显投档断档记录。声誉负面可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制；第五轮学科 评估中植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；与招生专业中的植物生产类、农学等直接关联，对农林类专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息类、电气工 程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，土木建筑类分化观望，农林类（植物生产、动物科学等）热度偏低；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约21.87万，较2025年（约18万） 明显增加，按近年比例估算物理类考生约14.76万人（+21.5%），竞争加剧。；贵州大学位于贵州省，距甘肃较远，属跨省 招生；该校在。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次36344名、招生计划持平、考生总数大幅增加（约+21.5% ）及学校排名持续上升等因素：考生增加使竞争加剧，学校排名提升增强吸引力，两者均指向位次数字略有减小（更难进）；声誉偏负面有轻微抑制。，预测2026年物理类最低位次约36044名，区间35544–36544名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the lowest science ranking was approximately 12639 → 13491 → 13725, showing a gradual backward trend year by year; in 2024, Gansu Province implemented the new college entrance examination (3+1+2 model), merging the first and second batches of undergraduate programs into a single undergraduate batch, restructuring the ranking system, and the lowest ranking for the Physics Category surged to 22229; in 2025, it further moved back to 36344. The significant backward shift in rankings over the past two years is mainly due to the batch merger, not a decline in the school's popularity; the school's enrollment plan for science/Physics Category in Gansu was 34 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 38 students from 2024 to 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 38 students, unchanged from 2025, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, reflecting the enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in recruitment announcements causing public opinion backlash, but the school has terminated the recruitment and apologized; Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of 340,000, and no obvious records of enrollment gaps. The negative reputation may have a slight inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the school; it is directly related to the enrollment majors such as Plant Production and Agriculture, providing some support for the application to agriculture and forestry majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended with high social popularity; civil engineering and architecture majors are divided and wait-and-see; agriculture and forestry majors (such as Plant Production and Animal Science) have low popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from about 180,000 in 2025, with an estimated 147,600 Physics Category candidates (+21.5%), intensifying competition. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, far from Gansu, and is a cross-provincial enrollment institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 36344, unchanged enrollment plan, a significant increase in total candidates (approximately +21.5%), and the school's continuously rising ranking: the increase in candidates intensifies competition, and the school's rising ranking enhances attractiveness, both pointing to a slight decrease in the ranking number (harder to enter); the negative reputation has a slight inhibitory effect. It is predicted that the lowest ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 36044, with a range of 35544 to 36544.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 35544–36544, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Plant Production has A- discipline support, offering high cost performance), Tier 1 majors (Electronic Information, Electrical, etc.) can be used as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<35544), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 engineering majors; if the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>36544), prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 2247→2238→2246→2192→2200 respectively, with a fluctuation range of only about 55 positions over five years, indicating extremely stable rankings with no obvious upward or downward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2200. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu's liberal arts/history category was 8 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 4 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan remains at 4 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with comprehensive strength improving, which also enhances its appeal to liberal arts candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a recruitment announcement incident), but this mainly involved management recruitment and is not directly related to undergraduate admissions; Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious abnormal filing records; Plant Protection (A-) is its only A- or above discipline, which has no direct connection with liberal arts majors (History, Economics and Trade).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the History major is stable; the Economics and Trade category belongs to the finance/economics/economy field, with recent popularity showing divergence and caution; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu general college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, with an estimated 71,000 history category candidates based on recent proportions (+21.8%), increasing competition due to the rise in candidates. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, far from Gansu, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the liberal arts enrollment scale is very small (4 students), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the extremely stable historical rankings (around 2200), unchanged enrollment plan, significant increase in total candidates (+21.8%), and the university's rising ranking: the increase in candidates slightly intensifies competition, while the university's ranking improvement enhances its appeal, both pointing to a slight decrease in the ranking number. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 history category will be approximately 2170, with a range of 1779–2561.
